calendar.matters:
Petition For Order 1)Modifying Truat For Changed Circumstances 2) Construing Provision Of Trust And 3) Reforming Trust Provision
Off Calendar Dec-12-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Gary Rothstein for Bank of America (Petitioner/Trustee).

The Court indicated that it has no problem with the $100,000.00 gift but that it should be based on 15403 rather then 15409. Counsel addressed issues raised in the Examiner's Notes with regard to Article Seven and Article Eight and that it was a scrivener's error. The Court is inclined to grant the petition and took the matter under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: None. (Not Reported)
